zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sidney III於大約1389年出生在英國素可可拉法姆時，他的父親William Sidney II35歲，母親Alicia Clumford35歲。他和Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他於1423年住在英國英格蘭素可。他去世於1449年10月8日在英國素可爾斯特享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sidney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Sidney Farm in Alfold (Surrey), from Old English sīd ‘large, spacious, long’ (dative sīdan) + ēg ‘island’.
possibly also a habitational name from any of the places called Saint-Denis in Normandy, named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Dionysius (see   Dennis  ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Sydney
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): variant of   Sidney  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sidney III was born about 1389, in Clapham, Sussex, England, his father, William Sidney II, was 35 and his mother, Alicia Clumford, was 35. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell. He lived in Sussex, England, United Kingdom in 1423. He died on 8 October 1449, in Penhurst, Sussex, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sidney III est né environ 1389, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Sidney II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alicia Clumford, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell. Il a vécu à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1423. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1449, à Penhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sidney IIIが約1389年にイギリススセックスクラファムで生まれた時，父William Sidney IIは35歳，母Alicia Clumfordは35歳であった。彼はElizabeth Ceselye Mitchellとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1423年にはイギリスイギリススセックスに住んでいた。彼は1449年10月8日にイギリススセックスペンハルストで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sidney III(이)가 대략 1389년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sidney II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Clumford(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1423년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 살았다. 그는 1449년 10월 8일 영국 수세스 펜후르스트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sidney III родился около 1389 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Sidney II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Clumford, 35. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell. Он жил в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в 1423 году. Он умер 8 октября 1449 г. в местности пенурст, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
